actions.message: Open Bootloader accesses multiple memory areas. To be able to perform successful read/write/erase operations the cache must be disabled.

select_uart_instance.title: Select USART instance
select_uart_instance.description: USART protocol can work on USART/UART or LPUART peripherals. Choose the USART/UART/LPUART instance that will be used on USART protocol.

actions.message: Instance must be selected. Select an instance to fix the error
USART interface must be used on asynchronous mode to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/mode' must be 'async'.
USART interface must use word length equal to 9 to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/word_length' must be '9'.
USART interface must use parity even mode to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/parity' must be 'EVEN'.
USART interface must use stop bit value equal to '1' to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/stop_bit' must be '1'.
USART interface must use both RX and TX pins directions be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/direction' must be 'TX_RX'.
USART interface must work with no hardware flow control to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/hw_flow_ctl' must be 'NONE'.

USART interface must work support auto-baudrate feature. To be compliant with the Open Bootloader, 0x7F frame will be used for the automatic baudrate detection. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::additional/set_config_auto_baud_rate' must be '0X7F_FRAME'.

select_i2c_instance.title: Select I2C instance
select_i2c_instance.description: Choose the I2C peripheral instance that will be used on I2C protocol.

actions.message: Instance must be selected. Select an instance to fix the error.

I2C interface must use 100000 or 400000 speed to be compliant with the Open Bootloader as speed 1000000 is not supported. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/speed_frequency_hz' must be '100000' or '400000'.
I2C interface must use 7-bit addressing mode to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/addressing_mode' must be '7'.
I2C interface use a non-zero address to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/addressing_mode' must be different from '0'.

select_i3c_instance.title: Select I3C instance
select_i3c_instance.description: Choose the I3C peripheral instance that will be used on I3C protocol.

actions.message: Instance must be selected. Select an instance to fix the error.
I3C interface must be configured as target be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/mode' must be 'TGT'.
I3C interface must be configured to use 'In-Band Interrupt (IBI)' feature to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/tgt_ibi' must be enabled.
I3C interface must use one byte length on the IBI to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/ibi_config/ibi_payload' must be '1_BYTE'.

select_spi_instance.title: Select SPI instance
select_spi_instance.description: Choose the SPI peripheral instance that will be used on SPI protocol.

actions.message: Instance must be selected. Select an instance to fix the error.
SPI interface must be used on full duplex mode to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/direction' must be 'FULL_DUPLEX'.
SPI interface must be configured on slave mode to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/mode' must be 'SLAVE'.
SPI interface must use 8-bit data width communication to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/data_size/data_width' must be '8'.
SPI interface data clock polarity must be set to low to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/timing/clock_polarity' must be 'LOW'.
SPI interface must allow capturing data on first clock edge to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/timing/clock_phase' must be '1'.
SPI interface must set transfer data order to MSB to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::basic/first_bit' must be 'MSB_FIRST'.
SPI interface must not be set to TI mode to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::additional/enable_ti_mode' must be 'DisableTI'.
SPI interface must use a FIFO threshold equal to '1' to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::additional/set_fifo_threshold' must be '1'.

SPI interface must enable underrun mode by sending a constant registered pattern to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::additional/underrun_configuration' must be 'REGISTER_PATTERN'.
SPI interface must have its interruption enabled to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::system/nvic/enable_interrupt' must be enabled.

SPI interface native interrupt handler must not be generated to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::system/nvic/irq_handler_generation' must be disabled.

select_fdcan_instance.title: Select FDCAN instance
select_fdcan_instance.description: Choose the FDCAN peripheral instance that will be used on FDCAN protocol.

actions.message: Instance must be selected. Select an instance to fix the error.
FDCAN interface must be used on normal mode to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::additional/mode' must be 'NORMAL'.
FDCAN interface must use baudrate switch frame format to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::additional/frame_format' must be 'FD_BRS'.
FDCAN interface must use FIFO for its communication to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::additional/tx_fifo_queue_mode' must be 'FIFO'.

FDCAN interface must use filters on FIFO0 for its communication to be compliant with the Open Bootloader. Expected value to fix the error on 'selection::additional/frame_filters/global_filter_config/acceptance_non_matching_ext' must be 'TO_RX_FIFO_0'.

select_can_instance.title: Select CAN instance
select_can_instance.description: Choose the CAN peripheral instance that will be used on CAN protocol.

actions.message: Instance must be selected. Select an instance to fix the error.

select_iwdg_instance.title: Select IWDG instance
select_iwdg_instance.name: IWDG_Class
select_iwdg_instance.description: Open Bootloader reloads the internal watchdog (IWDG) while communication is active, please choose the IWDG instance.

actions.message: Instance must be selected. Select an instance to fix the error.

select_flash_instance.title: Select Flash instance
select_flash_instance.name: Flash_Class
select_flash_instance.description: Open Bootloader can allow read/write and erase operations on the Flash/NVM memory, please choose the Flash/NVM instance.

actions.message: Instance must be selected. Select an instance to fix the error.
USBX middleware must be enabled to be used on Open Bootloader. Activate it to fix the error.
DFU device class must be used to be compatible with the Open Bootloader. To fix the error 'usbx::core/basic/device_class/dfu_class' must be enabled.
Descriptor must be changed to 'DFU' to compatible with Open Bootloader. To fix the error 'usbx::core/basic/device_class/dfu_interface/more/dfu_media' must be 'DFU'.

Request control maximum length must be increased to 1024 to be compatible with the Open Bootloader. To fix the error 'usbx::core/basic/device_class/device_core/more/ux_slave_request_control_max_length' must be '1024'.
USB PID must be 57105 to target DFU on the Open Bootloader. To fix the error 'usbx::core/basic/device_class/device_descriptor_config/more/usbd_pid' must be '57105'.
USBX system stack size  must be tt least 2048. To fix error 'usbx::core/applicative/usbx_system_stack_size' must be equal or more than '2048'.
The device controllers must be enabled to be used on the Open Bootloader. To fix error 'usbx::interfaces/logical_interface/device_controllers_enable' must be 'enabled'.
Please add item to packet memory area endpoint. To fix error 'usb_hardware::basic/pma_settings/1/direction' must be enabled and configured as output.
